name: codex-toys
description: Codex workflow authoring, toybox operation, SSH workbench orchestration, and dashboard proxy guidance.

interface.shortDescription: Author workflows and operate Codex workbench toyboxes.
interface.longDescription: codex-toys provides Codex guidance for workflow scripts, local and SSH stdio toyboxes, optional dashboard proxy use, workbench delegation, and local MCP delegation tools. This plugin installs the Codex-facing guidance directly from the Git repository.
defaultPrompt: Author a workflow script that can skip or start a Codex turn.
Check the local Codex workbench toybox.
Discover my Codex App remote connections and run codex-toys over SSH.
Run codex-toys against a remote Codex workbench over SSH.
Build a local dashboard proxy for a remote workbench over SSH.
